title: pouzolzia pentandra var. gracilis
intro: Pouzolzia pentandra var. gracilis, also known as 'Gentle Bane', is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae, native to tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Pouzolzia pentandra var. gracilis include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and protect against oxidative stress. Pouzolzia pentandra var. gracilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, and its leaves and roots are commonly used in traditional medicine.
